site.name: BitRemote
site.tagline: Remote download manager for NAS and home server tasks.
site.description: An app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac to remotely manage downloaders on NAS, seedbox, and home server setups.

cta.appStore: Download BitRemote on the App Store

hero.subhead: Built for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Connect to your downloaders to monitor activity and control download tasks from anywhere.

items.title: Rich accessibility support
items.subtitle: Supports VoiceOver, Voice Control, Larger Text, Dark Interface, Sufficient Contrast, Differentiate Without Color, and Reduced Motion.

items.title: Control remote download tasks
items.subtitle: Pause, resume, remove, and add tasks without going back to your NAS, seedbox, or home server dashboard.

items.title: Filter and sort large queues
items.subtitle: Review tasks by status, category, and tag so you can find active, paused, or completed downloads faster.

items.title: Monitor transfer activity
items.subtitle: Track real-time speeds, statistics, and transfer history from your downloader on iPhone, iPad, or Mac.

items.title: Back up downloader connections
items.subtitle: Export and import saved downloader setups in a unified JSON format when you move devices or reinstall the app.

items.title: Connect to self-hosted environments
items.subtitle: Optional certificate evaluation bypass helps when your downloader host uses a self-signed certificate.

quickstart.title: Get started in minutes

steps.title: Install
steps.body: Download BitRemote from the App Store on iPhone, iPad, or Mac.

steps.title: Connect
steps.body: Add your downloader with its host address and credentials.

steps.title: Manage
steps.body: Monitor activity, review queues, and control download tasks from iPhone, iPad, or Mac.

quickstart.requirements: Requires iOS / iPadOS / macOS 26.0 or later.

plus.title: Pricing
plus.subtitle: Start with the core app, then unlock advanced features for heavier downloader setups.
plus.note: $1.99 per month, $9.99 per year, or $49.99 for a one-time purchase plan.

items.q: Do I need to be on the same network?
items.a: Not always. BitRemote works with the network access your setup allows, including LAN, VPN, or another secure remote access method.

items.q: Does BitRemote download files on my device?
items.a: No. BitRemote is a remote controller for your existing downloader. The downloads stay on your NAS, seedbox, or server.

Your downloader credentials are never uploaded to our servers, so we cannot access them. However, credentials are not encrypted on-device. If you use BitRemote on a jailbroken device, your downloader credentials may be compromised.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: BitRemote’s official privacy policy is hosted by Ark Studios.

terms.title: EULA
terms.body: BitRemote’s official EULA is hosted by Ark Studios.

home.title: BitRemote
home.description: Remote download manager for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Control aria2, qBittorrent, Transmission, Synology Download Station, and QNAP Download Station from anywhere.

support.description: Get BitRemote support, report bugs, request features, and join the community for the remote download manager app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | BitRemote
privacy.description: Read the official BitRemote privacy policy from Ark Studios for the remote download manager app used with NAS and downloaders.
